promoted_finalists.selection_reason: second-highest registered search fitness after tie-breaks

observations_for_next_batch: The replicated twelve-proposer winner fell to ten exact cases, matching the strongest control.
Sequential proof repair made two useful and zero harmful corrections.
Large-base judge-free weighted review made one useful and zero harmful corrections.
Expanded judge-free review made three useful and zero harmful corrections, but began from a weaker proposer base.
Four cases had no correct answer from any of the 574 calls; GROWBLOCK and MODAFFINE remained especially sparse.
The final search batch should concentrate later calls on low-consensus cases and preserve distributed authority.
